title: penstemon cyananthus var. cyananthus
intro: Penstemon cyananthus var. cyananthus, also known as the spreading beardtongue, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever reduction, wound healing, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of spreading beardtongue can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used to promote overall health and well-being.
